title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF VALECUATRO, MACARTHUR AND TO-OG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LAVEZARES, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 594 / 55 OG No. 36, 7627 (September 7, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2470, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF VALECUATRO, MACARTHUR AND TO-OG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LAVEZARES, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following barrios are hereby created in the Municipality of Lavezares, Province of Samar:

Barrio Valecuatro, consisting of the sitios of Anahaw, Tarangban, Napandong and Talisay-Libtong;

Barrio MacArthur, consisting of the sitios of Danao, Dorongan, Calpe, Bagacy, Senemanyan, Penoselan, Tanawan and Cagbabacong; and

Barrio To-og, consisting of the sitios of Mestranza, Guenbetinan, Maelje, Cenedman, Maghagonhong, Cocala-pean and Guin-Campojan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
